variant: map out my first 8 weeks on minoxidil as a timeline

request.message: map out my first 8 weeks on minoxidil as a timeline

response_body.response: don't see a minoxidil timeline in your current docs. i have general info that results take several months of consistency, but no week-by-week breakdown for the first 8 weeks. what i can tell you: minoxidil works on blood flow and follicle stimulation, so you're looking at a slow ramp. most people don't see visible change until month 3–4. the first 8 weeks are about establishing the habit and letting it work, not chasing early wins. want me to pull a native minoxidil protocol if one exists in your full course, or are you looking for a general application schedule (AM/PM timing, dose, that kind of thing)?

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
